variants.label: span (inline — default)
variants.context: Inside an avatar element, safe for inline parents

variants.label: div (block)
variants.children: Chart showing monthly revenue. Use the data table below for details.
variants.context: Alongside a chart, providing a full description

variants.label: p (paragraph)
variants.children: Navigation section. Contains 5 links to main areas of the application.
variants.context: Block container where a paragraph is semantically correct

use_cases.description: Provides accessible name for icon-only buttons
Full context for visually abbreviated badge counts

edge_cases.label: very_long_text
edge_cases.children: This is a very long description that would be read by a screen reader but would clutter the visual UI if shown. It provides complete context for an otherwise ambiguous visual element.
edge_cases.note: No overflow issues — element is 1×1px regardless of content length

edge_cases.label: special_characters
edge_cases.note: Ampersands and parentheses read naturally via TTS

edge_cases.label: numeric_context
edge_cases.note: Screen readers may read '72%' differently — explicit text prevents ambiguity

edge_cases.label: nested_in_button
edge_cases.note: Atom has no forwardRef complexity — just passes ref through createElement
